Show / Hide Table of Contents

Namespace AspNetCore.Multitenancy.BackgroundJobs

Classes

HangfireExtensions

Extension methods on MultitenancyBuilder for Hangfire integration.

TenantBackgroundService

Base class for tenant-aware hosted services (IHostedService). Override ExecuteForTenantAsync(ITenantContext, CancellationToken) to implement per-tenant logic. The base class iterates all active tenants and calls your method in a scoped tenant context.

TenantJobActivator

Resolves Hangfire job instances from a per-tenant DI scope, ensuring that any scoped services (including ITenantContext) are resolved from the correct tenant scope.

TenantJobFilter

Hangfire server filter that automatically propagates tenant context into background jobs.

On enqueue: serializes the current TenantId into the Hangfire job parameters. On execute: reads TenantId from job params, creates a tenant DI scope, sets ITenantContext, then executes the job in that scope.

Register once in Program.cs — jobs see a fully populated ITenantContext identical to an HTTP request context.

TenantRecurringJobManager

Schedules Hangfire recurring jobs for every active tenant automatically. Use this instead of Hangfire.RecurringJob directly to ensure jobs run once per tenant with a properly populated ITenantContext.

In this article
